rationale: The most relevant development for Poland is the continued progress toward a US-Iran nuclear/peace deal, which could ease energy prices; Israel's strikes on Lebanon add regional instability but remain distant from Poland's direct concerns.

top_events.title: Iran claims deal with US near; Israel strikes Lebanon
top_events.summary: A US-Iran deal nearing conclusion could lower global energy prices, benefiting Polish households. Israeli strikes on Lebanon add Middle East instability but no direct spillover to Poland.

top_events.title: Anthropic suspends AI tools over US government security concerns
top_events.summary: US AI security restrictions have limited indirect relevance to Poland's tech sector and EU digital policy discussions, but no immediate impact on daily Polish life.

top_events.title: Switzerland votes on population cap at 10 million
top_events.summary: A Swiss referendum on capping population could affect EU migration dynamics marginally, but has negligible direct impact on Polish residents.
